title: Java PushbackReader
summary: The Java PushbackReader enables you to push back characters into the PushbackReader which has been read from it - for later re-reading. This is useful when parsing text or textual data formats.
content: The Java PushbackReader enables you to push back characters into the PushbackReader which has been read from it - for later re-reading. This is useful when parsing text or textual data formats.
